tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with prostate cancer and involved in the "Genomics of Circulating Tumor Cells".

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Seq_DNA_SNP_MAF_Ind: Sample(s) were used to generate aggregate mutation annotation file (.maf) with individual SNP genotypes; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID and primary disease of participants with prostate cancer and involved in the "Genomics of Circulating Tumor Cells".

variables.name: Sample Type
variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

tables.description: Subject ID and consent group of participants with prostate cancer and involved in the "Genomics of Circulating Tumor Cells".

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Sample ID, sample type, and analyte type of samples obtained from participants with prostate cancer and involved in the "Genomics of Circulating Tumor Cells".

variables.name: Primary Disease
variables.description: The main disease for which the participant has been asked to donate a sample for this study
